channel.title: AI Thought Leader Talks (YouTube)
channel.description: Original long-form talks and interviews with AI thought leaders, filtered by Claude.

item.title: [Sam Altman] LIVE: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Speaks at BlackRock Infrastructure Summit | DRM News | AI1F
item.author: DRM News
item.description:
DRM News · 39 min
LIVE: Sam Altman speaks at the BlackRock U.S. Infrastructure Summit in Washington, D.C. Leaders from government, technology, and finance gather to discuss investment, infrastructure development, and the role of emerging technologies in economic growth. Follow live remarks and insights from industry and policy leaders. For more details, watch our story and subscribe to our channel, DRM News.
LIVE: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Speaks at BlackRock Infrastructure Summit LIVE From Washington: Sam Altman Addresses U.S. Infrastructure Event Sam Altman Discusses Tech and Infrastructure Investment | Live LIVE: BlackRock Summit Featuring OpenAI CEO Sam Altman
Sam Altman, OpenAI CEO, BlackRock Infrastructure Summit, US infrastructure investment, Washington DC summit, technology and infrastructure, AI industry leadership, economic development conference, infrastructure policy discussion, tech leaders speaking event, BlackRock conference, US economy investment summit, innovation and infrastructure, business leadership summit, Reuters live coverage
#SamAltman #OpenAI #BlackRock #Infrastructure #AI #Live #TechLeaders #WashingtonDC #Innovation #BusinessNews #Economy
----------------------------------------------------------
Welcome to DRM News – your go-to source for breaking news and expert analysis on global affairs, showbiz, sports, AI, financial markets, and more. We believe that democracy dies in darkness, and we're committed to informing and educating you with unbiased, fact-based reporting.
At DRM News, we operate independently, without influence from corporations, advertisers, or governments. We cover the stories that matter – even the ones others avoid – because you deserve the truth.
Got a story idea or valuable feedback? 💡 Send us an email at info@newsdrm.com — whether it’s a tip, your opinion, or a topic you’d like to see covered.
🔔 Subscribe for daily updates 👍 Like, share, and comment to join the conversation 📢 Your voice matters – let us know what you think!
#BreakingNews #InternationalNews #AI #Sports #Showbiz #FinancialMarkets #DRMNews

item.title: [Sam Altman] We Interviewed Sam Altman at TreeHacks 2026
item.author: TreeHacks
item.description:
TreeHacks · 44 min
0:00 Steam tunneling and freshman year at Stanford 2:03 Founding Loopt in soph year 4:16 YC changes everything 6:16 Dropping out of Stanford 8:16 How to raise 10:38 How OpenAI was born, the early days 15:18 How he met OpenAI co-founders 17:03 OpenAI's first day in @gdb's apartment 19:01 When moment when OpenAI started to work 20:33 Why GPT-2 was the turning point 22:07 AGI will be here in 2 years. 25:32 What should people build now? 29:57 How AI will impact politics, religion, and society 34:24 How do you compete with OpenAI? 36:40 Is OpenAI *really* burning cash dangerously fast? 37:46 Sam, are you happy? 40:23 What AI subfield today feels like OpenAI in 2016? 42:26 Custom silicon & hardware

item.title: [Sam Altman] Squawk Pod: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Amazon CEO Andy Jassy 02/27/26 |Audio Only
item.author: CNBC Television
item.description:
CNBC Television · 49 min
OpenAI has closed a staggering $110 billion funding round, more than doubling its record-setting raise from just a year ago. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman joins alongside Amazon CEO Andy Jassy to discuss the massive new capital infusion, the details behind OpenAI and Amazon’s $50 billion strategic partnership, and what comes next for agentic AI. Then, IBM vice chairman and former Trump NEC director Gary Cohn reacts to news that Block is cutting 40% of its workforce, citing AI efficiencies. Cohn discusses what those cuts signal about the future of work, the broader economy, and the market’s AI-fueled momentum. Plus, Paramount Skydance moves closer to a deal for Warner Bros. Discovery, and President Trump meets with New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani.
In this episode:
Gary Cohn, @Gary_D_Cohn Sam Altman, @sama Andy Jassy, @ajassy Joe Kernen, @JoeSquawk Andrew Ross Sorkin, @andrewrsorkin Zach Vallese, @ZachVallese
For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/42d859g
» Subscribe to CNBC TV: https://cnb.cx/SubscribeCNBCtelevision » Subscribe to CNBC: https://cnb.cx/SubscribeCNBC » Watch CNBC on the go with CNBC+: https://www.cnbc.com/WatchCNBCPlus
Turn to CNBC TV for the latest stock market news and analysis. From market futures to live price updates CNBC is the leader in business news worldwide.

item.title: [Sam Altman] Rapid-Fire With Sam Altman: AGI, Elon Musk & What’s Next for AI | Express Adda With Anant Goenka
item.author: Indian Express Plus
item.description:
Indian Express Plus · 25 min
Sam Altman Rapid Fire: In a candid exchange, Sam Altman weighs in on AGI being close, super intelligence, China’s AI push, and tensions with Elon Musk. He backs democratising AI power, rejects claims about excessive water use, acknowledges energy concerns, and argues governments should regulate catastrophic risks not innovation.
A sharp conversation on geopolitics, regulation, and the future of AI.
IE+ is the home of Indian Express Originals. Powerful stories, deep conversations, sharp explainers and immersive narratives that shape the India of today and tomorrow. From exclusive interviews to long-form documentaries, IE+ brings you journalism that goes beyond the headlines.

item.title: [Sam Altman] "AI Will Reshape Geopolitics" – Sam Altman’s Warning to World Leaders
item.author: The Indian Express
item.description:
The Indian Express · 47 min
Sam Altman Interview: In this exclusive 60-minute interview, Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, answers 40 rapid-fire questions on ChatGPT, artificial intelligence risks, AI safety, regulation, AGI, and what the future holds for humanity.
Sam Altman addresses growing concerns about AI safety, government oversight, misinformation, job disruption, and whether artificial general intelligence (AGI) is closer than we think. He also discusses the evolution of ChatGPT, the competitive AI race, ethical safeguards, and the responsibilities of tech leaders in shaping powerful AI systems.
Is AI becoming too powerful? Should governments regulate AI more aggressively? What are the real risks of AGI? And what does the next decade look like for artificial intelligence? This is one of the most comprehensive and revealing conversations with Sam Altman to date. Topics Covered: ChatGPT future updates AI safety concerns AGI timeline predictions AI regulation and policy OpenAI’s long-term vision Risks vs rewards of artificial intelligence Jobs, automation & economic impact Ethical AI development Watch till the end for Altman’s most surprising answers.
#samaltman #openai #chatgpt #openainews #aiimpactsummit #bharatmandapam
00:00 Introduction 02:44 Sam Altman on AI in India 07:05 AI & Job Disruption: What Sam Altman Said 15:35 Big Tech & Government Relations 18:10 Sam Altman on China’s Tech Rise 23:48 The “Awkward Moment” with Dario Amodei 25:00 Rapid-Fire Round 50:25 Audience Q&A 57:50 Outro
The Indian Express covers a wide spectrum of national and international news, including daily updates, political developments, election coverage, gadget and mobile reviews, technology updates, entertainment news, Bollywood trends, sports news and public opinions on daily topics.
The Indian Express's comprehensive coverage extends to global events, providing insightful analysis on international affairs. With a focus on both Indian and global perspectives, the Indian Express delivers top-notch editorial analysis and in-depth reporting. Stay informed with the latest news, trends, explained and expert views from India and around the world.
You can search us on YouTube by: @indianexpress, indian express, indian express newspaper today,indian express newspaper,indian express editorial analysis,indian express analysis,indian express analysis today,indian express,indian express news,the indian express newspaper analysis,the indian express,the indian express newspaper analysis today,the indian express editorial analysis,the indian express newspaper.

item.title: [Sam Altman] Fireside Chat: Sam Altman×Vinod Khosla and AMA at IIT Delhi | 20 February 2026
item.author: IIT Delhi
item.description:
IIT Delhi · 53 min
Watch Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, in conversation at IIT Delhi. The video features a fireside chat moderated by Vinod Khosla, Co-founder of Sun Microsystems, followed by an AMA with students at the iconic Dogra Hall, IIT Delhi.
Watch the highlights of the Day with Ms. Sunita Williams at IIT Delhi here: https://youtu.be/UgRDioSUeeI

item.title: [Andrew Ng] EducAIted Voices: Dr. Andrew Ng, Exploring Computer Science & K12 Education
item.author: EducAIted
item.description:
EducAIted · 28 min
Welcome to the premiere episode of EducAIted Voices, an interview series hosted by Emma Ludwick and Dr. Bailey Ubellacker. We are dedicated to helping K-12 educators navigate the rapidly shifting world of Artificial Intelligence.
In our debut episode, we sit down with a true luminary: Dr. Andrew Ng.
https://www.coursera.org/learn/ai-for-everyone https://www.deeplearning.ai/ https://www.kira-learning.com/ https://www.deeplearning.ai/courses/build-with-andrew/
As the founder of DeepLearning.AI, co-founder of Coursera, and the founding lead of Google Brain, Andrew has taught millions how AI works. Today, he joins us to bridge the gap between high-level computer science and the K-12 classroom.
In this episode, we discuss:
(1)The New Electricity: Why AI is a transformative force for every industry. AI Literacy: What students actually need to know to thrive in an AI-powered world.
(2) Empowering Educators: How to demystify models, dive into coding, and manage data in schools.
(3) Innovation Without Permission: Taking the lead on tech in your own educational environment.
"The best time to start learning is now." — Dr. Andrew Ng

item.title: [Andrew Ng] AI Pioneer: The Bubble Is Real And Could Trigger an AI Winter | Andrew Ng
item.author: This Is The World
item.description:
This Is The World · 54 min
Will we get AGI in 2026? Will AI agents replace programmers? Is the open-source AI era ending — and is China already ahead? In this episode, Andrew Ng breaks down why “AGI” (Artificial General Intelligence) has become a marketing term, why the world is still decades away from real AGI, and what the real story is: AI agents, agent workflows, and practical AI adoption that changes business long before human-level intelligence arrives.
We go deep on the gap between AI benchmarks and real-world usefulness, the risk of an AI hype bubble leading to another AI winter, and why open-source / open-weight models matter if we want to avoid an AI oligopoly dominated by a few proprietary frontier model labs. We also talk about the future of work, AI job automation, and why education systems are still training people for jobs that no longer exist.
Andrew Ng is a leading AI researcher and entrepreneur, former head of Google Brain, co-founder of Coursera, and a major voice on machine learning, deep learning, and building real-world AI products.
In this episode you’ll learn: • What AGI should mean — and why redefining it fuels hype • Andrew’s new Turing-style AGI test: multi-day, economically valuable work • Why benchmarks can improve while AI feels “worse” to users • What AI agents and agentic workflows will actually deliver in 2026 • Open-source AI vs proprietary models (and why China is a key player) • Which jobs are at risk (call centers, translation, voice work) — and why most won’t vanish overnight • Why AI education needs a radical update (students trained for 2022 roles) • The real stakes: innovation freedom vs an AI oligopoly
Chapters: 00:00 AGI as a marketing term (Artificial General Intelligence) 01:00 AGI in 2026? Andrew Ng’s answer 03:33 A practical AGI test 05:05 AI benchmarks vs real-world performance 08:55 AI agents and agent workflows in 2026 23:29 AI hype bubble 30:14 Open-source, open weights, and avoiding an AI oligopoly 42:58 AI automation and jobs most exposed 46:00 China vs the US in AI 53:08 Meaning, happiness, and what AI is for
Matt Kawecki (host) on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maciejkawecki Andrew NG (guest) on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrewyng/ This is The World: https://www.thisisworld.org/ This is The World on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thisistheworld_podcast/
Don't forget to subscribe to our channel and turn on notifications so you won't miss any of our future episodes ► https://www.youtube.com/@UCHzNtQ4KyLbfEZhiKnHHRiw
#ai #agi #technology #future #andrewng #thisistheworld

item.title: [Yann LeCun] "LLMs Are A Dead End": An Exclusive Interview With The Genius Father of AI | Yann LeCun
item.author: This Is The World
item.description:
This Is The World · 51 min

item.title: [Yann LeCun] Ep. 3 - A University and Corporate Perspective with Yann LeCun
item.author: Stanford Digital Economy Lab
item.description:
Stanford Digital Economy Lab · 81 min
Tom sits down with Yann LeCun, the Jacob T. Schwartz Professor of Computer Science at NYU, and Executive Chairman of Advanced Machine Intelligence Labs.
Yann is co-winner of the 2018 ACM Turing Award for his research in neural network learning. Yann takes us from his days as a postdoc working with Geoff Hinton, through his days as Chief AI Scientist at Facebook/Meta. His simultaneous roles as a Professor at NYU and Chief AI Scientist at a large AI provider gives Yann a unique perspective on how technological advances and commercial forces combined to get us to today's state of the art.

item.title: [Yann LeCun] LIVE: Yann LeCun Speaks at India AI Impact Summit
item.author: India Today Global
item.description:
India Today Global · 80 min
Watch LIVE as AI pioneer Yann LeCun addresses the India AI Impact Summit. Known for his groundbreaking work in deep learning and neural networks, LeCun shares insights on the future of artificial intelligence, machine learning research, open-source AI, and global innovation.
A leading voice in AI development and Chief AI Scientist at Meta Platforms, LeCun discusses emerging technologies, responsible AI, large language models, and India’s growing role in the global AI ecosystem.
#YannLeCun #AIImpactSummit #IndiaAI #ArtificialIntelligence #DeepLearning #MetaAI #TechSummit #AILeadership #Innovation #LIVE
India Today Global is an India-based news channel that serves as an international arm of India's prominent media organization. It aims to provide factual, up-to-date news, analysis, and insights from India and around the world. The channel delivers a mix of content, including political news, business updates, entertainment, and cultural stories, focusing on both India-centric news and broader global issues.
India Today Global features expert commentary, interviews, and in-depth reporting on key developments in India, as well as how they intersect with global events. It is known for its reputation as a trusted source of news in India. India Today Global is designed to cater to the Indian diaspora in the US while also appealing to international viewers interested in South Asian affairs and perspectives on global news.
It's the English news brand that understands and fits perfectly into the digital-first lifestyles of our English news audiences.
The marquee shows of our channel are:
Statecraft: Our Executive Editor Geeta Mohan decodes the truth, cut out the noise, and present you the real facts that shape your world. We'll dissect the narratives spun by competing interests, analyze the subtle shifts in geopolitical landscapes, and illuminate the underlying forces that drive international relations. Expect rigorous analysis, informed perspectives, and a commitment to clarity in a world often obscured by deliberate ambiguity. We'll explore the economic levers, the military strategies, and the cultural influences that intertwine to form the complex tapestry of global power. Join us as we navigate the corridors of influence and reveal the hidden mechanisms that govern our interconnected world.
Threadbare: We dive deep into global politics to unwind myths and expose false narratives shaping the world. Our episodes tackle disinformation, political information, and geopolitical myths to provide fact-based insights. Stay informed with in-depth analysis on international relations, political crisis, and global events. If you're interested in debunking political myths, exploring truth behind media narratives, and understanding the real forces driving global politics, this playlist is for you!
Follow us on Twitter: https://x.com/ITGGlobal

item.title: [Yann LeCun] AI Research Symposium: The Next Frontiers | Keynotes by Demis Hassabis, Yoshua Bengio & Yann LeCun
item.author: moneycontrol
item.description:
moneycontrol · 113 min
Welcome to the Research Symposium on Enabling AI at Nation Scale, hosted by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY).
This landmark event brings together the world’s leading pioneers in Artificial Intelligence to discuss the future of discovery, engineering, and national infrastructure. Featuring keynote addresses from Turing Award winners and industry visionaries, we explore how AI acts as a catalyst for scientific breakthroughs and the "Grand Challenges" facing the global research community today.
#aisummit #aisummit2026 #indiaaisummit2026
Moneycontrol is India’s leading financial portal, offering market news, expert analysis, and powerful tools. A part of Network18, moneycontrol.com is India’s most trusted destination for financial and business news. #live #livenews #latestnews #topnews #moneycontrol #moneycontrollive #businessnews #businessnewslive #stockmarket #stockmarket #sharemarketnews #stockmarketliveupdates Subscribe: https://bit.ly/moneycontrolyoutube Follow us: Visit https://www.moneycontrol.com/ Facebook: /moneycontrol Twitter: /moneycontrolcom Instagram: /moneycontrolcom

item.title: [Yann LeCun] Move Over LLMs! Yann LeCun & Alex LeBrun Debut AMI Labs’ World Models for Healthcare
item.author: Offcall
item.description:
Offcall · 35 min
Are large language models enough for medicine? In this special episode of How I Doctor, Turing Award winner Yann LeCun and Nabla founder Alex LeBrun join Dr. Graham Walker to introduce AMI Labs and make the case for a new AI paradigm in healthcare: world models. While today’s LLMs power clinical documentation, chatbots, and decision support tools, Yann argues they are fundamentally designed to predict the next word — not simulate physiology or reason through consequences. In medicine, where reliability matters more than creativity, that distinction is critical. Together, they explore why stochastic AI systems may hit a wall in healthcare, how physicians mentally simulate patient outcomes before acting, and why training AI purely on notes reduces biology to language. This conversation isn’t about replacing doctors. It’s about building AI that can reason, plan, and amplify clinical judgment. If you’re a physician thinking about the future of AI in medicine, this episode is essential.
⏱ Topics Covered 00:00 – LLMs Predict Words. World Models Predict Patients 05:10 – What Is a World Model? 10:40 – The ER Mental Model Analogy 18:20 – Why 80% Accuracy Fails in Healthcare 24:35 – Language Is a Projection of Biology 31:50 – From Documentation to Real Reasoning 38:15 – The Future of AMI Labs and World Models
🔗 Episode Links Article + Transcript: offcall.com/learn/podcast/ai-world-models-medicine-yann-lecun-alex-lebrun
Nabla: https://www.nabla.com/ Offcall: https://www.offcall.com
Follow Dr. Graham Walker: https://www.linkedin.com/in/grahamwalker Follow Yann LeCun: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yann-lecun/ Follow Alex LeBrun: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexandrelebrun/
#healthcareai #LLMs #WorldModels #medicalai #clinicalai #physicianlife #futureofmedicine #digitalhealth
